descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes defeat Pembroke Lumber Kings 9-3 in Centennial Cup semifinal, advance to final against Humboldt Broncos.
descriptionLong: The Richmond Sockeyes defeated the Pembroke Lumber Kings 9-3 in a Centennial Cup junior-A hockey semifinal on Thursday night to advance to the championship final. The British Columbia team will face Saskatchewan champion Humboldt Broncos in a sudden-death final Saturday, a rematch of their Western Canada championship series. Richmond scored goals from Trevor Dickie, Steve Jaques, Matt Hervey, and others while outshot Pembroke 44-32.

attribution.headline: Richmond Sockeyes whip Pembroke Lumber Kings to reach Centennial Cup final
